segments.text: Help, LORD, for the godly one is gone; for the faithful have vanished from among the children of men.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Everyone utters lies to his neighbor; with flattering lips and a double heart they speak.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May the LORD cut off all flattering lips, the tongue that makes great boasts,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: who have said, 'With our tongue we will prevail, our lips are with us; who is master over us?'
segments.speaker: Proud speakers

segments.text: 'Because the poor are plundered, because the needy groan, I will now arise,' says the LORD; 'I will place him in the safety for which he longs.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The words of the LORD are pure words, like silver refined in a furnace on the ground, purified seven times.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You, O LORD, will keep them; you will guard him from this generation forever.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: him, etc: that is, every one of them, etc

segments.text:
The wicked walk on every side, 
when the vilest men are exalted.

footnotes: of the sons of the men
